build.beforeDevCommand: sh -c 'if [ -f ./src-tauri/scripts/start-dev-server.sh ]; then sh ./src-tauri/scripts/start-dev-server.sh; else sh ./scripts/start-dev-server.sh; fi'
build.beforeBuildCommand: sh -c 'if [ -f ./src-tauri/scripts/prepare-frontend-dist.sh ]; then sh ./src-tauri/scripts/prepare-frontend-dist.sh; else sh ./scripts/prepare-frontend-dist.sh; fi'
